task_completion.description: Create a global Ingest Profile named 'Fast_Triage' with specific modules enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Options' -> 'Ingest Profiles' window or 'Run Ingest Modules' dialog showing a profile named 'Fast_Triage' with ONLY 'File Type Identification', 'Hash Lookup', and 'Extension Mismatch Detector' checked.

task_completion.description: Create a new forensic case named 'Backlog_Triage_2024'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window showing the case name 'Backlog_Triage_2024' in the title bar or case dashboard.

task_completion.description: Add 'ntfs_undel.dd' as a data source to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Sources' tree in the Autopsy left panel shows 'ntfs_undel.dd'.

task_completion.description: Run the ingest process using the 'Fast_Triage' profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A progress bar in the bottom right corner of Autopsy or an ingest completion message indicating that ingest modules are running or have finished.

task_completion.description: Write an administrative audit report to /home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt with the exact required lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt' containing the exact 5 lines specified in the task description.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to configure the profile and create the case.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface, rather than just editing configuration files or databases via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the ingest process in Autopsy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the ingest process running or completing in Autopsy, proving the agent didn't just skip to writing the audit report.

integrity.description: The audit report is saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows the file path as exactly '/home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Autopsy ingest profile named 'Fast_Triage', a case named 'Backlog_Triage_2024' (Case Number: INV-SOP-001), and adding data source 'ntfs_undel.dd'. The profile must ONLY enable 'File Type Identification', 'Hash Lookup', and 'Extension Mismatch Detector'. Finally, an audit report must be created at /home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt with specific content.
